sentence: 大一新生都要修一门经济学概论课。
pinyin: Dà yī xīn shēng dōu yào xiū yī mén jīng jì xué gài lùn kè.
english: All first-year university students are required to take an introductory economics course.

meaning: 1. to seek knowledge; 2. to study; 3. to attend college
sentence: 他去北京求学，希望考上名校。
pinyin: Tā qù Běi jīng qiú xué, xī wàng kǎo shàng míng xiào.
english: He went to Beijing to study, hoping to get into a top university.

meaning: 1. to fall back; 2. to return to low level after a rise (in water leve
sentence: 天气变凉后，蔬菜价格开始回落。
pinyin: Tiānqì biàn liáng hòu, shūcài jiàgé kāishǐ huíluò.
english: After the weather turned cool, vegetable prices started to fall back.

sentence: 这款游戏用了三维画面，很逼真。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yóuxì yòng le sān wéi huàmiàn, hěn bīzhēn.
english: This game uses 3D graphics and looks very realistic.

sentence: 农民在地里施了化肥，庄稼长得很好。
pinyin: Nóngmín zài dì lǐ shīle huàféi, zhuāngjia zhǎng de hěn hǎo.
english: The farmer applied chemical fertilizer to the field and the crops grew well.
